comment: Scene library, curated from scout run 20260719-051757 (seed 1669320484). time: 23000=dawn 1000=morning 6000=noon 12300=dusk 15000=night 18000=midnight. rot: [yaw, pitch]; yaw 0=+Z(south) 90=-X(west) 180=-Z(north) 270=+X(east); pitch + looks down. | NOTE: grain-* scenes belong to the reflection-artifact debug session - please preserve them when editing.

scenes.name: smoke
scenes.desc: Smoke-test scene at world origin, noon, high vantage.

scenes.name: V1-hills-noon
scenes.desc: Rolling green hills, snowy range to the SW, horizon cumulus. Cloud + skylight workload.

scenes.name: V2-ocean-dusk
scenes.desc: Open ocean with icebergs, low sun glint on water (stock-water mandate check). Sunset atmosphere + SSR.

scenes.name: V3-jungle-dawn
scenes.desc: Jungle hills and river valley at sunrise. Backlit foliage, SSS, crepuscular rays.

scenes.name: V4-flowerlake-morning
scenes.desc: Flower forest, misty lake, snowy peaks behind. Morning mie haze + bloomy fog.

scenes.name: V5-icepeaks-dusk
scenes.desc: Jagged ice spires at dusk, alpenglow. Shadow + cloud steps stress.

scenes.name: V6-night-galaxy
scenes.desc: Midnight galaxy band + stars over flower forest (day-9 night: clear cloud-noise sample). Purkinje + star/galaxy path.

scenes.name: V7-ember-night
scenes.desc: Dark forest with surface lava at night. Warm blocklight vs cool night grade.
